query:
-- تحديث حساب admin
UPDATE users 
SET accountStatus = 'active', 
    trialEndDate = NULL,
    subscriptionStartDate = NOW(),
    subscriptionEndDate = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 YEAR)
WHERE username = 'admin';

-- إضافة اشتراك دائم
INSERT INTO tenant_subscriptions (tenantId, status, pricePerMonth, startDate, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, 'active', 0.00, NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 YEAR), NOW(), NOW());

-- إضافة محفظة برصيد
INSERT INTO wallets (userId, balance, currency, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, 10000.00, 'USD', NOW(), NOW());
